title: pelargonium × jacquinianum
intro: Pelargonium × jacquinianum, also known as Rose Geranium or Cape Rose, is a hybrid plant species within the Geraniaceae family, resulting from the cross between Pelargonium capitatum and Pelargonium spp. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Rose Geranium include its ability to relieve anxiety and stress, reduce inflammation, and promote a good night's sleep. Rose Geranium is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, essential oils, and tinctures, making it a popular choice in aromatherapy and natural medicine.
